sprint.name: Forge Expansion Sprint
sprint.note: A scheduled review is not a guaranteed release. The forge publishes at most one coherent change when it clears the quality and safety gates; otherwise it skips the window.
sprint.secondaryAutomation: A separate GitHub Actions workflow runs Tuesday and Friday at 15:17 UTC. It can only create or improve approved declarative-engine apps and records accepted publishes in this ledger.

method.label: Inspect
method.description: Review the live site, repository, current apps, open feedback, bugs, depth, accessibility, and portfolio gaps.

method.label: Compare
method.description: Consider at least three candidate changes and choose the one that creates the strongest useful depth or breadth.

method.label: Build one
method.description: Create or improve one coherent feature or app, including mobile, keyboard, touch, reduced-motion, teardown, and edge cases.

method.label: Validate
method.description: Run JavaScript syntax checks, feedback-routing tests, registry rules, required-file checks, and safety-boundary validation.

method.label: Publish or skip
method.description: Merge and deploy only after every required check passes. Skip when the candidate is weak, unsafe, duplicative, or incomplete.

qualityGates: One coherent change maximum per review window
No secrets, trackers, accounts, hidden storage, or unreviewed network behavior
No direct execution of user feedback
Mobile, keyboard, touch, focus, and reduced-motion behavior considered
Repository validation must pass before main is published

queue.title: Fabline Control process-window balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on knob differentiation, hidden-drift readability, inspection value, contamination and maintenance pressure, wafer scarcity, yield targets, narrow-screen steppers, keyboard operation, endpoint-control unlock pacing, and whether engineer recovery restores options without erasing cost and trust consequences.

queue.title: Relevance Lab ranking-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on signal differentiation, ranking readability, experiment-budget pressure, diversity and freshness tradeoffs, commercial-bias penalties, narrow-screen steppers, keyboard operation, extra-experiment unlock pacing, and whether rollback restores options without erasing trust and score consequences.

queue.title: Acoustic Commons adaptive-soundscape balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on layer differentiation, venue-target readability, cue-shift fairness, energy and fatigue pressure, optional audio comfort, narrow-screen controls, keyboard operation, open-air unlock pacing, and whether guest-artist recovery restores options without erasing score and trust consequences.

queue.title: Civic Ledger fiscal-strategy balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on service-allocation clarity, priority and shock readability, revenue and reserve pressure, debt consequences, equity and resilience scoring, narrow-screen steppers, keyboard controls, participatory-grant unlock pacing, and whether stabilization aid restores options without erasing trust and score consequences.

queue.title: Conservator's Bench treatment-sequencing playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on material compatibility, diagnosis value, treatment-order readability, reversibility costs, authenticity and stability balance, aging-test fairness, narrow-screen tool density, keyboard shortcuts, microclimate unlock pacing, and whether senior-conservator recovery restores options without erasing score and authenticity consequences.

queue.title: Argument Architect rhetoric-and-audience balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on claim-evidence-response sequencing, audience-priority readability, objection variety, credibility and time pressure, support targets, keyboard assignment, narrow-screen card density, source-check unlock pacing, and whether advisor recovery restores options without erasing score and credibility consequences.

queue.title: Trackline Ranger inference-and-route balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on clue readability, weather decay, hidden-route fairness, camera placement, movement and energy costs, route-prediction precision, narrow-screen grid use, keyboard selection, thermal-camera unlock pacing, and whether ranger assist restores options without erasing score and trust consequences.

queue.title: Collection Navigator discovery and mobile playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on search relevance, ordering, category interaction, late-loading cards, session history, surprise selection, narrow-screen stacking, focus visibility, and visible-count accuracy.

queue.title: Harbor Pilot traffic-and-docking balance playtest
queue.reason: Collect evidence on wind and current readability, traffic fairness, control differentiation, berth clarity, fuel and hull pressure, narrow-screen controls, keyboard operation, unlock pacing, and tug recovery consequences.

recentDecisions.title: Fabline Control 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a semiconductor fabrication simulator, a cooperative ecosystem-management game, and an emergency logistics simulator. Prioritized Fabline Control because six production lots, hidden tool drift, process knobs, wafer scarcity, contamination, maintenance, yield, throughput, cost, progression, failure, engineer recovery, and a session unlock add an underserved industrial process-control loop without storage, permissions, or network behavior.
checks: Yield, throughput, contamination and cost tradeoffs
Endpoint-control unlock and one-use engineer recovery
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring

recentDecisions.title: Relevance Lab 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Compared a search-relevance laboratory, a cooperative ecosystem-management game, and an emergency logistics simulator. Prioritized Relevance Lab because six query sets, weighted ranking signals, limited experiments, relevance, diversity, freshness and commercial-pressure tradeoffs, progression, failure, rollback recovery, and a session unlock add an underserved information-retrieval strategy loop without storage, permissions, or network behavior.
checks: Relevance, diversity, freshness and commercial-pressure tradeoffs
Extra-experiment unlock and one-use rollback recovery
Reduced motion, teardown and safety wiring

recentDecisions.title: Acoustic Commons 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Six venues, layered synthesis, shifting audience needs, energy, fatigue, optional audio, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added an audio-first strategy loop.

recentDecisions.title: Civic Ledger 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Six fiscal years, service allocation, shocks, reserves, debt, equity, resilience, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added a civic-systems strategy loop.

recentDecisions.title: Conservator's Bench 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Material diagnosis, reversible treatment sequencing, delayed aging tests, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added a preservation-strategy loop.

recentDecisions.title: Argument Architect 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Claim-evidence-response sequencing, changing audiences, objections, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added a rhetorical-strategy loop.

recentDecisions.title: Trackline Ranger 1.0.0
recentDecisions.summary: Hidden movement, decaying clues, camera placement, route prediction, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added an ecological-inference loop.

recentDecisions.summary: Search, ordering, visible counts, session history, and surprise selection improved discovery across the growing gallery.

recentDecisions.title: Harbor Pilot 1.1.0
recentDecisions.summary: Continuous vessel motion, drift, traffic, fuel, hull, progression, failure, recovery, and a session unlock added a real-time navigation loop.
